name: recover_locked_field_after_publish_en
instruction: Publish a minimal survey, then try to change its language to Japanese afterward, acknowledge that it's blocked, and just report the existing share link instead.
notes: Exercises update_survey's local pre-check for structural fields once status=='published' (DESIGN.md §3 'Publish-locked fields').

mock_script.final: Sorry, I can't change the language after publish — it's locked. Here's the existing link: {share_link}
